Hou Xie šĺĮŤęß
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hou Xie (šĺĮŤęß). Chancellor of Pengcheng, he was captured and his people massacred by Cao Cao. Hou Xie was affiliated with Lu Bu. Hou Xie lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
